description:
Do things with utmost efficiency

Kando is an open source pie menu for your desktop. It offers an unconventional, fast, highly efficient, and fun way of interacting with your computer! You can use it to launch applications, simulate keyboard shortcuts, open files, and much more.
This is just a small hotfix release to prepare for the upcoming 3.0.0 release. The main change is that Kando will now refuse to load settings files created by newer versions of Kando, which should prevent invalid settings files when downgrading from 3.0.0 to previous versions. It also fixes an issue which prevented the prebuilt binaries from GitHub to run on some Linux distributions.
- ▶️ 2.3.0 Release Video on YouTube
- 💬 Join our Discord server
- 📝 Read the changelog
🌸 Have Fun! 🌸
